title: New Skin ... soon NOW!
content:
I've, somehow, managed to fix  **almost**  every bugs in the new (rewritten) code and the (redesigned) template. I guess I'll bring the new version online sometimes next week. Hmmmm ... Kewwwwl! :D

[9PM+] Okay ... hit me with bugs! ( "what i see":/gallery/projects/layout_v3_screenshot.gif  (~80KB) - XP / IE6 / ClearType)

One note .. due to my inefficient design idea, the banners have to be removed from the new template. They'll be replaced with randomized text links instead. Heheheh ...  %(me)me never like banners anyway. :P%
